payload.label: coffee maker
payload.long_description: Front-facing compact black plastic single-serve coffee maker with a circular top pod chamber, removable drip tray and a small chrome accent; glossy plastic surface, dim lighting, appliance is mostly visible and centered (not edge-cropped), estimated about 0.6 m from the camera.
